title: Customer Complaint Recovery Playbook
description: Repeatable complaint recovery for small business and vending ops. Apply framework + templates; do not improvise under stress.

mindset.principle: Complaint is feedback delivered badly. Job is restore trust, not win argument.

mistakes.label: Defend before you listen
mistakes.cost: Customer hears you're wrong; escalation guaranteed

mistakes.label: Over-promise to end the call
mistakes.cost: Broken promise = second complaint, worse tone

mistakes.label: Sorry and disappear
mistakes.cost: No follow-up = insincere even if you meant it

steps.action: Let them finish; take notes; repeat back the problem
Apologize for their experience (not always legal fault)
Does this work for you? before closing

process.overview: Same five steps for phone, in-person, email, chat. Tone changes; steps do not.

decision_branches.script: I want to fix this: I need thirty seconds to understand exactly what happened. Can we do that?
decision_branches.notes: Lower voice, slow down, don't match volume. Escalate only for threats or abuse, not discomfort.

decision_branches.script: You're right: we dropped this. Here's what I'm doing in the next [timeframe].
decision_branches.notes: Offer remedy before they demand. Log as service_failure.

decision_branches.situation: Policy says no refund / no exception
decision_branches.script: I can't refund per our policy because [reason]. What I can do is [credit / redo / discount next visit].
I'll get a manager now OR I'm the person who can resolve this: give me one chance, and if you're still not satisfied I'll bring in [name].
Treat like any complaint. Fix issue first.
decision_branches.notes: No review bargaining. After resolution: optional invite to update review. Never pay for reviews.

monthly_review: Any repeat customers? Same root cause?
Any nuclear complaints? What changed in process?
One fix to implement before next month?
One recovery that went well: share with team.

compensation.move: Sincere apology + small credit (5-15% next order)
Redo service or full refund of affected item
Stop: document, escalate, no liability admission in writing without advice

compensation_rule: Compensation matches harm, not volume of yelling.
prevention: Fix root cause in ops, not just customer in front of you.
Tag log categories; wait time spikes = scheduling problem.
Post internal what we learned from nuclear complaints (no names).

cheat_sheet.quick_ref: Listen · Acknowledge · Resolve · Ask (confirm) · follow up in writing

agent_signal.use_when: Existing customer is angry, threatening reviews, or reporting a failure on delivered work.
decision_criteria: Acknowledge before explain. Written reply same day when possible.
Severity sets refund vs fix vs route; log every touch.
agent_signal.operator_context: Local reputation spreads fast in Treasure Valley; one public review can outrank years of word-of-mouth.
